text:

HP Proliant 360DL G3/ 1U/ Xeon 1*2,4GHz/533MHz/512Kb L2/ 4Gb,ECC/ 2*SCSI,NO HDD/ 1*Floppy/1*CD-ROM/ 1*PSU/ 2*NIC 1Gbit/s/ iLo/
